message.content:
In /home/garrosh/repos/wc3-build-order-app, I need to understand the design/layout patterns used across section cards so I can redesign the build order input section.

1. Read src/global.css and find the CSS for:
   - .section-card styles
   - .build-card styles (the existing build order card layout - it has a nice two-column grid)
   - .build-orders-toolbar styles
   - .menu-components-grid and .menu-widget styles (from the controls section)
   - .skill-order-section styles
   - .build-order-input-* styles (the current input section styles)
   - Any grid or form layout patterns used elsewhere

2. Read the current BuildOrderInputSection.tsx to understand its structure

3. Look at how the build-card uses CSS grid (grid-template-columns etc.) for its two-column layout

I want to understand what layout primitives and patterns exist so we can design a better layout for the input form.
